zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Baynham於1475年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩時，她的父親Sir Thomas Baynham53歲，母親Agnes Walwyn23歲。她於1490年與Sir Gilles Brydges在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1515年12月1日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可利享年40歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Baynham于1475年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Baynham53岁，母亲Agnes Walwyn23岁。她于1490年与Sir Gilles Brydges在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1515年12月1日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾可利享年40岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利。

nameMeanings.name: Baynham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English (West Midlands): variant of Welsh   Bennion  .

variants.name: Bennion
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’ (see Eynon ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Baynham was born in 1475, in Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Baynham, was 53 and her mother, Agnes Walwyn, was 23. She married Sir Gilles Brydges in 1490, in Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 1 December 1515, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Baynham est née en 1475, à Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Baynham, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Agnes Walwyn, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gilles Brydges en 1490, à Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 décembre 1515, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Baynham 1475 in Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Baynham 53 und ihre Mutter Agnes Walwyn 23. Sie hat 1490 in Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir Gilles Brydges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Dezember 1515 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Baynham è nata il nel 1475 nel Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Baynham, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Agnes Walwyn, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gilles Brydges nel 1490, nel Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 dicembre 1515, nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Coberley, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Baynhamが1475年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアミッチェルディーンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Baynhamは53歳，母Agnes Walwynは23歳であった。1490年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアミッチェルディーンでSir Gilles Brydgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1515年12月1日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーで40歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Baynham(이)가 1475년 영국 그루스스터실르 미트헬디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Baynham(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Walwyn(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 미트헬디에서 Sir Gilles Brydges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 12월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Baynham nasceu em 1475, em Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Baynham, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Walwyn, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Gilles Brydges em 1490, em Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1515, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Baynham родилась в 1475 г. в местности мичелдин, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Baynham было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Walwyn, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gilles Brydges в 1490 г. в местности мичелдин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 1 декабря 1515 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Baynham nació en 1475, en Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Baynham, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Agnes Walwyn, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Gilles Brydges en 1490, en Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de diciembre de 1515, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
